image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Plastic doesn’t disappear; it just breaks down.
Context visual: Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner.
Escalation visual: They travel up the food web, from plankton to fish… and even into our plates.
Evidence visual: Research from NOAA shows microplastics can disrupt marine life and ecosystems.
Payoff visual: But don’t panic! Scientists are working to understand and tackle this issue.
Cta visual: Stay informed and protect our oceans. Hit like and follow for more science insights!
